plan.title: Raise Foghorn 1 and Foghorn 3 one octave

narratives.Description: Raise Foghorn 1 and Foghorn 3 one octave
narratives.Overview:
## Request

Fog horn 1 and fog horn 3 feel too low — raise both one octave (+12 semitones). Keep the existing perfect-fifth interval between blasts.

## Current notes (`src/audio/voices.ts`)

| Voice | Tone 1 (1 s) | Tone 2 (2 s) | Hz |
|-------|--------------|--------------|-----|
| Fog horn 1 | B1 | E1 | 61.74 → 41.21 |
| Fog horn 3 | C2 | F1 | 65.41 → 43.66 |

Interval today: perfect fifth down (7 semitones), aligned across fog horns 1–4 per #54 / PR #57 / live v23.

## Target notes (+12 semitones)

| Voice | Tone 1 | Tone 2 |
|-------|--------|--------|
| Fog horn 1 | B2 | E2 |
| Fog horn 3 | C3 | F2 |

Keep `FOG_HORN_*_INTERVAL_SEMITONES = 7`. Update the exported `FOG_HORN_1_*` / `FOG_HORN_3_*` Hz constants and comments to match.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Fog horn 1 plays B2 then E2 (one octave above current B1→E1)
- [ ] Fog horn 3 plays C3 then F2 (one octave above current C2→F1)
- [ ] Perfect-fifth relationship between blasts is unchanged
- [ ] Fog horns 2 and 4 are untouched unless a follow-up asks otherwise
- [ ] Quick listen in-app confirms the higher pitch without breaking the gated two-blast timing

## Refs

Follows the perfect-fifth foghorn alignment in #54 / PR #57.

items.title: Fog horn 1 plays B2 then E2 (one octave above current B1→E1)
Fog horn 3 plays C3 then F2 (one octave above current C2→F1)
Perfect-fifth relationship between blasts is unchanged
Fog horns 2 and 4 are untouched unless a follow-up asks otherwise
Quick listen in-app confirms the higher pitch without breaking the gated two-blast timing
